hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Woodwork
hero.subheadline: From custom built-ins to intricate trim, we bring precision and passion to every project.

featureSections.title: Built-In Beauty for Every Room
featureSections.body: Our custom cabinetry transforms kitchens, bathrooms, and living spaces with handcrafted woodwork that maximizes storage and adds timeless elegance.
bullets: Bespoke designs tailored to your style
featureSections.cardBody: From traditional to modern, our cabinets are built to last and designed to impress.

featureSections.title: Flawless Finish with Expert Trim
featureSections.body: Crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting add character and value. We install with precision for seamless, beautiful results.
featureSections.cardBody: Add architectural interest and a touch of class to any room.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with meticulous attention to detail by experienced carpenters.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: No cookie-cutter work. We listen to your needs and create one-of-a-kind pieces that fit your space perfectly.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your home with care, keeping the workspace tidy and minimizing disruption to your daily life.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From small repairs to full renovations, our carpentry services in Dallas cover every need. We combine traditional techniques with modern tools to deliver exceptional results.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Bespoke cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.longDescription: We design and build custom cabinets that maximize storage and enhance your home's aesthetic. Using premium materials and expert joinery, each piece is tailored to your specifications.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget to create a design plan.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We provide detailed drawings and help you choose wood, hardware, and finish.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our team installs with precision and applies the final finish for a flawless look.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build custom cabinets?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. We'll help you choose based on style and budget.

services.title: Trim & Molding Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting.
services.longDescription: Add architectural detail and value with our precision trim installation. We handle everything from simple baseboards to intricate crown molding and custom wainscoting.
benefits: Enhances home value and curb appeal
Wide variety of styles and profiles

process.title: Measurement & Design
process.description: We measure your rooms and recommend molding profiles that complement your home.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from MDF, solid wood, or polyurethane based on budget and durability needs.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install with coped joints for a seamless look and caulk and paint for a perfect finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.description: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or blend new trim with old for a cohesive look.

faqs.question: How much does crown molding installation cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies by linear footage and complexity. We provide free estimates.

services.title: Deck & Porch Building
services.shortDescription: Custom outdoor living spaces built to last.
services.longDescription: Create the perfect outdoor retreat with a custom deck or porch. We design and build structures that blend with your home and landscape, using durable materials like cedar, composite, and pressure-treated lumber.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your yard, sun exposure, and layout to design the ideal deck.

process.title: Design & Permitting
process.description: We create plans and handle necessary permits to ensure code compliance.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our team builds the deck with proper footings, framing, and finishing touches.

faqs.question: What materials do you recommend for decks?
faqs.answer: We recommend composite for low maintenance or cedar for natural beauty. Both are durable.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faqs.answer: Most decks take 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity.

services.title: General Carpentry Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fix it right the first time.
services.longDescription: From squeaky stairs to broken cabinets, we handle all types of carpentry repairs. Our goal is to restore functionality and appearance with lasting solutions.
benefits: Uses quality materials for lasting repairs
Covers a wide range of issues

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue and identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the repair needed and provide a transparent quote.

process.title: Execution
process.description: We complete the repair efficiently, leaving your space clean.

faqs.question: Do you do small repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, no job is too small. We handle everything from door adjustments to drywall patches.

faqs.question: Can you match paint or stain?
faqs.answer: We can color-match existing finishes to ensure repairs blend seamlessly.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Carpentry Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to deliver exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service, transforming homes with quality woodwork that stands the test of time.
story: Carpenter WE TRUST was founded in 2010 by a team of skilled carpenters who believed in doing the job right the first time. Starting with small repairs, we built a reputation for precision, reliability, and honest pricing. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service carpentry company serving homeowners across Dallas.

Every project, whether a custom built-in or a simple repair, receives the same dedication to quality. We use time-honored techniques combined with modern tools to create beautiful, functional spaces. Our 18 five-star reviews reflect our commitment to customer satisfaction and our love for the craft.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every project meets our high standards for materials and workmanship.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide transparent pricing, honest advice, and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with respect, communicating clearly and leaving a clean workspace.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to bring your carpentry project to life? Contact us for a free consultation and estimate.
